turns.user_message: I used to really look forward to the weekend, but now it's just another day. It's a strange feeling that I'm trying to ignore.
This flat feeling has been hanging around for weeks and I can't shake it. I keep doing things that should feel good, but they just don't.
I feel completely hollow, like all the color has drained out of my life. Nothing I try brings back even a flicker of how things used to feel.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This used to not bother the speaker.
